data.label: Start: Intro to UI/UX Design
data.description: Understand design thinking, the double diamond process, and differences between UI and UX.

data.label: User Research Fundamentals
data.description: Learn to conduct interviews, surveys, and create user personas and empathy maps.

data.label: Intro to Figma & Wireframing
data.description: Master Figma basics and sketch low-fidelity wireframes to map out layouts.

data.label: Visual Design Principles
data.description: Deep dive into typography, color theory, spacing, and gestalt principles.

data.label: Information Architecture
data.description: Organize content, create sitemaps, and map out intuitive user flows.

data.label: High-Fidelity Prototyping
data.description: Turn wireframes into interactive, high-fidelity prototypes using Figma.

data.label: Interaction Design
data.description: Design micro-interactions, state changes, and smooth animations.

data.label: Usability Testing
data.description: Conduct moderated and unmoderated usability tests to gather user feedback.

data.label: Accessibility (a11y)
data.description: Ensure designs meet WCAG guidelines for color contrast and screen readers.

data.label: Mobile vs Web Design
data.description: Understand responsive grids, iOS Human Interface, and Material Design guidelines.

data.label: Design Systems
data.description: Build component libraries, auto-layout, and maintain scalable design systems.

data.label: Developer Handoff
data.description: Document design specs, redlines, and communicate effectively with engineers.

data.label: Portfolio & Case Studies
data.description: Compile your best projects into detailed, story-driven case studies.

data.label: Job Ready: Junior UI/UX Designer
data.description: Resume optimization, whiteboard challenges, and interview preparation.
